title: ADULT BEHAVIORAL HEALTH - 211info
text: LANE COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH ADULT BEHAVIORAL HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides individual and group therapies, case management, peer support services, and medication management. 2411 Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 682-1001 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 682-1001 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information if applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-5pm Services: Community Mental Health Agencies Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Peer Mental Health Support Services Psychiatric Case Management Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CHILD AND ADOLESCENT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - LANE COUNTY-WIDE CRISIS LINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MOBILE CRISIS SERVICES OF LANE COUNTY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LANE COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH
